title: James Pierce
about: James Pierce or TheJames.Pierce is an AI-generated character on TikTok (@thejames.pierce) made to combat Dany Slicer , another AI-generated character who went viral in February 2026 as the "ultimate villain of 2026." Pierce's account posted a series of photographs on February 12th, 2026 that are similar to Slicer's "villain" photos, quickly going viral. Pierce inspired memes over the following days that paint him as a hero and the "CEO of Goodcorp," whereas Slicer is referred to as the "CEO of Evilcorp."
origin: On February 12th, 2026, TikToker [1] @thejames.pierce posted a slideshow with the description "I'm coming for you, Slicer," consisting of four photographs. The photos depict Pierce, who is AI-generated according to AI checker app IsThisAI, posing in a variety of ways. The video gained over 820,000 views in a day.
